name: compmamba
paperTitle: CompMamba: A Memory-Efficient Selective State Space Model for Compositional Visual Reasoning
content:
## Introduction

State space models provide memory efficiency while maintaining expressiveness for compositional reasoning. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

State space models provide memory efficiency while maintaining expressiveness for compositional reasoning.
